message:
feat: BD_BRANCH support for branch-per-polecat write isolation

When BD_BRANCH env var is set (by Gas Town gt sling), checkout the
polecat-specific Dolt branch on connection open. Forces single
connection to ensure all operations use the correct branch.

This eliminates Dolt optimistic lock contention between concurrent
polecat writers. Each polecat bd process writes to its own branch;
merges happen at gt done time via Gas Town.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
